text_content: Varian utilizes a process based on the Rational Unified Process, and is defined in document reference DND01 Design and Development. This procedure defines the phases of a project, and more specifically, the various documentation requirements for each project phase to provide a high level of confidence in both the product, and the processes used to develop that product. The procedure further defines the level of management oversight necessary, in the form of Phase Gates at the end of each prescribed phase. The main purpose of the procedure is to comply with global regulatory requirements for design control, in particular US FDA 21 CFR 820, and ISO 13485. A second document, RSK01 Medical Device Risk Management is used to supplement DND01 and provides guidance on Risk Management consistent with EN ISO 14971:2019 Error! Reference source not found.. text_content: Varian utilizes a process based on the Rational Unified Process, and is defined in document reference DND01 Design and Development. This procedure defines the phases of a project, and more specifically, the various documentation requirements for each project phase to provide a high level of confidence in both the product, and the processes used to develop that product. The procedure further defines the level of management oversight necessary, in the form of Phase Gates at the end of each prescribed phase. The main purpose of the procedure is to comply with global regulatory requirements for design control, in particular US FDA 21 CFR 820, and ISO 13485.
